headline: CME Group to Expand Equity Index Suite with Launch of Four New E-mini Futures Contracts
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced it will expand its benchmark suite of Equity Index futures with the launch of four new E-mini contracts, pending regulatory review.

headline: ECB Hikes Rates to Tame Inflation. The Fed Could Follow.

headline: CME Group to Launch New Financially-Settled Micro E-mini S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100 Options

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

headline: Rothschild & Co Upgrades CME Group to Buy, Raises Price Target to $323
